description:
This endpoint creates or updates a batch of Company Users.
See [Using Sync Actions](/documentation/using-sync-actions) for additional information.

Requires Directory Admin permissions.

#### Country and State codes
The `country_code` and `state_code` parameter values must conform to the ISO-3166 Alpha-2 specification.
See [Working with Country Codes](/documentation/country-codes) for additional information.

id.description: The ID of the Company User

first_name.description: The First Name of the Company User

last_name.description: The Last Name of the Company User

job_title.description: The Job Title of the Company User

address.description: The Address of the Company User

city.description: The City of the Company User

zip.description: The Zip code of the Company User

business_phone.description: The Business Phone of the Company User

business_phone_extension.description: The Business Phone Extension of the Company User

mobile_phone.description: The Mobile Phone of the Company User

fax_number.description: The Fax Number of the Company User

email_address.description: The Email Address of the Company User

email_signature.description: The Email Signature of the Company User

is_active.description: The Active status of the Company User

is_employee.description: The Employee status of the Company User

employee_id.description: The ID of the Employee of the Company User when `user[is_employee]` is set to `true`

notes.description: The Notes (notes, keywords, tags) of the Company User

country_code.description: The Country Code of the Company User (ISO-3166 Alpha-2 format)

state_code.description: The State Code of the Company User (ISO-3166 Alpha-2 format)

initials.description: The Initials of the Company User

origin_id.description: The Origin ID of the Company User

origin_data.description: The Origin Data of the Company User

vendor_id.description: The ID of the Vendor of the Company User

default_permission_template_id.description: The ID of the default Permission Template for the Company User

company_permission_template_id.description: The ID of the Company Permission Template for the Company User

work_classification_id.description: The ID of the Work Classification for the Company User

avatar.description:
The Avatar of the Company User.
To upload avatar you must upload whole payload as `multipart/form-data` content-type and
specify each parameter as form-data together with `user[avatar]` as file.
